title: Behavioral framework + TMABY + 'why us' stories
focus: STAR / CAR; 90-second TMABY; tailored 'why this company'.

items.label: Trapping Rain Water
interviewQuestions: Compare DP (precompute left-max, right-max) vs two-pointer O(1) space — walk through the two-pointer invariant.
What if rainwater can flow off the sides — how does that change anything?

items.label: STAR / CAR framework with worked examples
interviewQuestions: Walk through STAR with one of your real stories.
How do you keep a STAR answer under 3 minutes without losing impact?

items.label: Tell-me-about-yourself: 90-second version
interviewQuestions: Tell me about yourself in 90 seconds.
What three threads should every TMABY hit?

items.label: Why this company / why this role
interviewQuestions: Why this company? Tailor in 60 seconds.
Why this role over similar roles you've applied for?
